channel.title: SPL - Southwest Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Southwest Branch

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Sunday, April 12, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Southwest Branch, Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: Baby Story Time
item.description:
Monday, April 13, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Southwest Branch, Meeting Room

At storytime, kids ages 0-18 months and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities.

Event details

item.title: Creative Skillshare Night
item.description:
Tuesday, April 14, 2026 at 4:30 PM

Location: Southwest Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for a night of creative practice, collective care, and community-building with the West Seattle Mutual Aid Party.

Event details

item.title: Monthly All Ages Movie: "E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial"
item.description:
Wednesday, April 15, 2026 at 2:30 PM

Location: Southwest Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for screening of "E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial" (1982).

Event details

item.title: Spring Break: Blanket Fort Reading Party
item.description:
Thursday, April 16, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Southwest Branch, Meeting Room

Join us over spring break to create a blanket fort and read at the library! 

Event details

item.title: All Ages Science Party
item.description:
Sunday, April 19, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Southwest Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for an all-ages event! Hang out with real scientists and enjoy fun activities.

Event details

item.title: Baby Story Time
item.description:
Monday, April 20, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Southwest Branch, Meeting Room

At storytime, kids ages 0-18 months and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities.

Event details
